query: Crime and Punishment Fyodor Dostoevsky English translation page count 671 592 pages
answer: "Crime and Punishment" by Fyodor Dostoevsky in the Constance Garnett translation has 592 pages. The 2017 Liveright edition by Richard Pevear and Larissa Volokhonsky has 624 pages. The page count varies by edition.
